title: Techno Pairs
subtitle: The objective of this event was to bring a platform where participants can team up with three other random participants and get into an exciting journey of problem solving, algorithms, and coding.
description: Title of the event: Techno PairsObjective: The objective of this event was to bring a platform where participants can team up with three other random participants and get into an exciting journey of problem solving, algorithms, and coding. Crossing every level would bring a new twist and challenge. This event was a technical treasure hunt where a storyline was created based on the theme ‘Global Innovation’ in accordance to BVEST's.Participants were paired up randomly in a group of 4 for round 1
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
